title: No Campfire Smoke
description: A lightweight client-side Minecraft Forge mod that disables campfire smoke particles
body:
**No Campfire Smoke** is a lightweight client mod that removes smoke particles from campfires.

It is ideal for builders, explorers, and PvP players who want unobstructed views or cleaner aesthetics without changing the game mechanics. This mod only affects visual effects and does not affect gameplay, servers, or standard behavior.

_P.S. I won't lie, I found many resource packs that turned off smoke from campfire, BUT when I turned it on in my modpack, the FPS in settlements did NOT change at all. That's why this mod exists. Thanks to it, the situation has improved at least a little._

- _The **“Remove smoke from all bruning sources”** option disables ALL particles from smoke sources. I tested it a little and didn't encounter any bugs, but it MAY create artifacts and bugs in the game. Therefore, use it with caution._
